title: agrostis scabra var. montana
intro: Agrostis scabra var. montana, also known as mountain bent grass, is a perennial grass species native to mountainous regions of North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis scabra var. montana are said to include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Agrostis scabra var. montana can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in water, and it is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
